name: Stewart'S
description_short: Member-owned federal credit union serving Stewart's Shops employees and families with competitive rates on auto loans, mortgages, personal loans, and deposit accounts.
description_long:
Stewart's Federal Credit Union was created specifically to serve employees of Stewart's Shops Corporation and their immediate families. As a federally chartered credit union, it is member-owned and not-for-profit, with deposits insured up to $250,000 by the NCUA (National Credit Union Administration). The organization operates with a mission to build lifelong relationships by providing quality financial services at fair rates while maintaining personal, community-focused service.

The credit union offers a comprehensive range of financial products including checking and savings accounts, certificates of deposit (currently offering 3.50% APY on 12-month CDs), auto loans (as low as 4.49% APR), home equity loans (as low as 6.49% APR), personal loans (as low as 8.24% APR), recreational loans (as low as 7.99% APR), and mortgage services through a partnership with Premium Mortgage Corporation. They also provide credit builder loans designed to help members establish or improve credit history. Digital banking is available through their mobile app and online platform with features including balance checks, transaction viewing, fund transfers, bill pay, and mobile check deposit.

Stewart's FCU distinguishes itself through personalized service and member testimonials highlighting exceptional customer care. Members note the family-like atmosphere and willingness of staff to explain financial products thoroughly. A notable example from their website shows one member refinancing an auto loan and saving $10,000 over the loan term compared to dealership rates. The credit union also hosts educational events on financial topics like estate planning and maintains a referral program offering incentives for new member recruitment.

As a membership-based credit union, Stewart's FCU's primary limitation is eligibility—only employees of Stewart's Shops Corporation and their immediate family members can join. This restriction, while standard for employer-sponsored credit unions, means the institution is not accessible to the general public. Additionally, while competitive rates are advertised, the website provides limited detail on membership fees, account minimums, or comprehensive product terms.
services: Checking accounts with online and mobile banking
Auto loans as low as 4.49% APR
Home equity loans as low as 6.49% APR
Personal loans as low as 8.24% APR
Recreational vehicle loans as low as 7.99% APR
Credit builder loans for credit establishment
Mortgage services (through Premium Mortgage Corporation partnership)
Mobile app with balance checks, transactions, transfers, and bill pay
pros: Competitive auto loan rates starting at 4.49% APY with personalized guidance through the lending process
Strong member testimonials highlighting exceptional customer service and personal attention from staff
12-month CDs offering 3.50% APY with flexible 6- and 24-month term alternatives
Credit builder loan program specifically designed to help members establish or rebuild credit
Partnership with Premium Mortgage Corporation for home lending services
Full-featured mobile app and online banking including mobile check deposit capability
Federal NCUA insurance protection up to $250,000 on member deposits
cons: Membership restricted to Stewart's Shops Corporation employees and immediate family members—not open to the general public
Limited information on the website regarding account fees, minimum balances, or detailed product terms and conditions
No physical branch location information or hours of operation provided on the website
Limited product diversity compared to larger financial institutions
Website does not clearly specify eligibility requirements beyond 'employees and immediate family'
best_for: Stewart's Shops employees seeking competitive rates on auto loans and refinancing
Members of Stewart's Shops employee families looking to build credit or establish financial accounts
Employees seeking personalized banking service with relationship-focused support
People refinancing auto loans from dealerships to secure better interest rates
diagnosis: Stewart's Federal Credit Union is best for employees of Stewart's Shops Corporation and their families who seek competitive lending rates and personalized service. The primary caveat is that membership is restricted to this employee group and immediate family, making it inaccessible to the general public despite its favorable terms and strong service reputation.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
meta_title: Stewart's — Credit Union in Saratoga Spring, NY | CreditDoc
